generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a local news report about how expanded domestic security powers helped stop a potential terror plot in our state last month. The new measures worked exactly as intended - caught the bad guys before they could act. Why would anyone want to weaken these protections? Our community is safer because of them. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurNeighbors
